prompt: A cinematic third-person action RPG gameplay screenshot set in {argument name="city district" default="Macau Peninsula, New Road"}, styled like a gritty realistic open-world crime game from the late 1990s. The camera is positioned behind a lone male protagonist standing in the middle of a rain-soaked street, full body visible from the back, wearing a dark brown leather jacket with a large embroidered dragon on the back, blue jeans, and dark shoes. He faces a dense neon-lit urban street packed with pedestrians, old shopfronts, hanging signs, tangled cables, weathered apartment buildings, and a tram approaching from the center distance. The scene is at dusk under a cloudy sky, with wet asphalt reflecting orange, pink, blue, and white neon signage. The environment should evoke old Macau with a Cantonese-Portuguese visual mix: narrow streets, vintage cars, crowded sidewalks, multilingual storefront signs, one large glowing sign reading GRAND LISBOA, another reading BANCO TAI SIN, and many vertical Chinese neon signs layered into the depth of the street. Include 1 tram in the middle lane, 1 black sedan parked on the left, and around 10 to 14 pedestrians crossing or standing on both sides of the road. Add realistic puddles, crosswalk lines, metal railings in the right foreground, storefront interiors with warm lighting on the left, and a moody noir atmosphere. Overlay a complete game HUD: top left circular character portrait with the name {argument name="character name" default="龍少爺"}, level 36, 3 horizontal status bars; top center compass with N and E markers plus the location text and a clock reading 14:35; top right circular minimap with icons; right side quest tracker panel containing 3 quest groups with Chinese text, with the top highlighted quest header in orange; bottom left semi-transparent chat box with 4 colored lines of Chinese system and world chat plus a text entry bar and a send button; bottom center hotbar with 7 skill slots labeled 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, Q, E, R, including a large ornate circular ultimate icon at the center and one glowing purple skill icon; bottom right 5 menu icons with Chinese labels for character, inventory, quests, friends, and settings, plus a small ESC indicator. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic rendering, dramatic reflections, dense environmental storytelling, realistic crowd scale, high-end PC game UI, muted cinematic color grading with neon highlights.
translatedPrompt: 一张电影级的第三人称动作 RPG 游戏截图，设定在 {argument name="city district" default="澳门半岛，新马路"}，风格类似于 20 世纪 90 年代末写实风格的开放世界犯罪游戏。摄像机位于一名男性主角身后，他正站在雨水浸湿的街道中央，全身背影可见，身穿深棕色皮夹克，背部绣有巨大的龙纹，搭配蓝色牛仔裤和深色鞋子。他面对着一条霓虹灯闪烁的繁华街道，街上挤满了行人，两旁是老式店面、悬挂的招牌、错综复杂的电缆、饱经风霜的公寓楼，一辆电车正从远方中心驶来。场景设定在黄昏时分，天空多云，湿漉漉的柏油路面反射着橙色、粉色、蓝色和白色的霓虹灯光。环境应体现出澳门老城的特色，融合粤式与葡式视觉元素：狭窄的街道、复古汽车、拥挤的人行道、多语言店招，其中一个巨大的发光招牌写着“GRAND LISBOA”，另一个写着“BANCO TAI SIN”，街道深处层叠着许多垂直的中文霓虹招牌。画面包含中间车道上的 1 辆电车，左侧停放的 1 辆黑色轿车，以及道路两侧约 10 到 14 名正在穿行或站立的行人。添加逼真的水坑、人行横道线、右前方的金属护栏、左侧灯光温暖的店面内部，营造出一种忧郁的黑色电影氛围。叠加完整的游戏 HUD：左上角圆形角色头像，标注名称 {argument name="character name" default="龍少爺"}、36 级、3 条水平状态栏；顶部中央带有 N 和 E 标记的指南针，以及位置文本和显示 14:35 的时钟；右上角带有图标的圆形小地图；右侧任务追踪面板，包含 3 组中文任务文本，顶部高亮显示的任务标题为橙色；左下角半透明聊天框，包含 4 行彩色中文系统和世界聊天信息，以及文本输入栏和发送按钮；底部中央热键栏，包含 7 个技能槽，分别标记为 1、2、3、4、5、Q、E、R，中心有一个巨大的华丽圆形终极技能图标，以及一个发光的紫色技能图标；右下角 5 个带有中文标签的菜单图标，分别对应角色、背包、任务、好友和设置，并附带一个小的 ESC 指示器。超精细、写实渲染、戏剧性的反射效果、丰富的环境叙事、真实的群体规模、高端 PC 游戏 UI，以及带有霓虹高光的低饱和度电影级调色。

breakdown.creativeCore: 雨夜霓虹澳门 RPG 游戏截图：此提示词可生成一张写实风格的开放世界动作 RPG 游戏场景，背景设定在雨夜霓虹闪烁的澳门老街，非常适合用于游戏概念艺术、UI 模型或电影级宣传视觉图。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: layered, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, vintage]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon, camera]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
